mapper.select: SELECT `year_month` as month, SUM(net_salary) as total FROM t_salary_record GROUP BY `year_month` ORDER BY `year_month` ASC LIMIT 12
SELECT SUM(base_salary) as baseSalary, SUM(perf_bonus) as perfBonus, SUM(overtime_pay) as overtimePay, SUM(allowance) as allowance FROM t_salary_record WHERE `year_month` = #{yearMonth}
SELECT dept_name as dept_name, AVG(net_salary) as avg_salary FROM t_salary_record GROUP BY dept_name
